definition:
1. any one connected by marriage , Lat. affinis, (Aeschulus Tragicus): 
2. a son-in-law , Lat. gener, (Homer) 
3. a brother-in-law, a sister's husband , (Iliad by Homer); or, a wife's brother  (Sophocles Tragicus) 
4. = πενθερός, a father-in-law , (Euripides) 
5. doric and aeolic a bridegroom, wooer, suitor , (Pindar) (ML)
